About Me

We design with purpose,
we build with passion.

Emma Jr Web is a creative web design studio founded by Emmanuel Jr, dedicated to helping businesses and individuals build a powerful online presence.

We believe every brand deserves a beautiful, functional website that looks great and converts visitors into loyal customers.

From sleek website designs to eye-catching jingle videos, our team brings creativity and strategy to every single project we take on.

Whether you're a startup, a growing business, or an established brand looking for a refresh — we've got you covered.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does it take to build a website? +
Most websites are completed within 1–2 weeks depending on complexity. Landing pages can be done in as little as 3–5 days. We'll give you a clear timeline before we start.
What information do I need to provide to get started? +
We'll need your business name, logo (if available), content like text and images, color preferences, and examples of websites you like. Don't worry — we guide you through every step.
Do you offer website maintenance after launch? +
Yes! We offer ongoing maintenance packages to keep your website updated, secure, and running perfectly after it goes live.
Will my website work on mobile phones? +
Absolutely. Every website we build is fully responsive, meaning it looks and works great on all screen sizes — phones, tablets, and desktops.
What is a jingle video and do I need one? +
A jingle video is a short, catchy promotional video with music or audio branding. It's great for social media, ads, and intros. If you want your brand to be memorable, it's a powerful tool.
How do I pay and what are your rates? +
Pricing depends on the scope of the project. Contact us via the form below or email us at emmanueljr807@gmail.com and we'll send you a custom quote tailored to your needs.
Can you redesign my existing website? +
Yes! Website redesign is one of our core services. We'll analyze your current site and create a fresh, modern version that performs better and looks stunning.
